1.title: Open System Lateral Sway Evaluation Panel

content.text: System shall open the System Lateral Sway (G3) — Evaluation Model panel when the user selects the G3 test from the Rules and Actions → Testing tab.
the System Lateral Sway evaluation panel to open when I select the G3 test
I can review the evaluation model.
I am viewing the Rules and Actions → Testing tab,
I select the System Lateral Sway (G3) test,
the system opens the System Lateral Sway (G3) — Evaluation Model panel.
System shall display the panel title “System Lateral Sway (G3- test id) — Evaluation Model”.
I know which rule configuration I am reviewing.
the system displays the title “System Lateral Sway (G3 — test id) — Evaluation Model”.
System shall display a Global scope indicator beside the evaluation model title.
the Global scope indicator displayed beside the title
I understand the scope of the evaluation model.
the system displays the Global scope indicator.
System shall display a description indicating the evaluation is derived from δ(z) survey data for global horizontal drift assessment.
a description explaining the evaluation purpose
I understand what the model measures.
the system displays text indicating the evaluation is derived from δ(z) survey data for global horizontal drift assessment.
System shall display a Measurement Basis section explaining that lateral sway is computed from δ(z) values measured at the base and top of uprights in the rack run.
I understand how lateral sway is calculated.
the system displays the Measurement Basis section explaining that lateral sway is computed from δ(z) values measured at the base and top of uprights.
System shall display an informational note stating that system drift is derived from mean top and base δ(z) values.
see a note explaining how system drift is derived
I understand the data processing approach.
the Measurement Basis section is visible,
the system shows a note stating system drift is derived from mean top and base δ(z) values.
System shall display the Calculation Logic section as read-only.
the Calculation Logic section displayed in read-only mode
I can review the system calculation method.
the system displays the Calculation Logic section in read-only mode.
System shall compute δ_base,mean as the average of all base deviation values across uprights.
the system to compute the average base deviation
the baseline alignment reference is determined.
base deviation values exist across uprights,
it computes δ_base,mean as the average of all base deviation values.
System shall compute δ_top, mean as the average of all top deviation values across uprights.
the system to compute the average top deviation
top deviation values exist across uprights,
the system computes δ_top,mean as the average of all top deviation values.
System shall compute Δ_sys = δ_top, mean − δ_base, mean.
the system to compute system drift
horizontal displacement across the rack system can be evaluated.
the system computes Δ_sys = δ_top,mean − δ_base,mean.
System shall compute the Drift Ratio = Δ_sys / H_m, where H_m represents frame height in meters.
the system to compute the drift ratio
Δ_sys and frame height values are available,
the system calculates Drift Ratio = Δ_sys / H_m.
System shall display an informational note explaining that H_m refers to frame height used in drift ratio calculation.
a note explaining frame height usage
I understand the variable used in drift calculations.
the system indicates H_m represents frame height used in drift ratio calculation.
System shall display a RAG Criteria section defining the severity classification thresholds for system drift.
the system shows the RAG Criteria section.
System shall classify the result as Green when Drift ≤ 1/500.
I know when system drift is acceptable.
the system classifies the result as Green when Drift ≤ 1/500.
System shall classify the result as Amber when 1/500 < Drift ≤ 1/300.
I know when system drift requires monitoring.
the system classifies the result as Amber when 1/500 < Drift ≤ 1/300.
System shall classify the result as Red when Drift > 1/300.
I know when system drift becomes critical.
the system classifies the result as Red when Drift > 1/300.
System shall display a note indicating that drift is dimensionless.
see a note explaining that drift is dimensionless
the RAG Criteria section is visible,
the system shows a note indicating that drift is dimensionless.
System shall display an Output Preview section summarizing computed evaluation outputs.
I can review calculated evaluation results.
the system displays the Output Preview section.
System shall display the computed System Drift (Δ_sys in mm) value in the Output Preview.
see the computed system drift value
the system displays Δ_sys in millimetres.
System shall display the calculated Drift Ratio in the Output Preview.
I can review the stability indicator.
the Output Preview section is displayed,
the system shows the drift ratio value.
System shall display the drift expression as 1/N where N = H(mm) / Δ_sys.
I can understand the equivalent ratio representation.
the system displays the drift expression as 1/N where N = H(mm) / Δ_sys.
System shall display the final RAG classification result based on the drift ratio thresholds.
the final RAG classification result displayed
I understand the system stability status.
the system shows the final RAG classification.
System shall populate output values automatically using system-calculated survey data.
evaluation results reflect system survey data.
the system populates output values automatically.
System shall allow users to close the panel using the Close (X) icon in the header.
close the panel using the close (X) icon
I click the close (X) icon in the header,
System shall provide a Close button to exit the evaluation panel.
I can exit the evaluation panel.
the system provides a Close button.

26.title: Return to Testing Tab After Closing Panel

content.text: System shall return the user to the Rules and Actions → Testing tab when the panel is closed.
return to the Rules and Actions → Testing tab after closing the panel
the panel is closed using Close or the X icon,
the system returns the user to the Rules and Actions → Testing tab.
